name: cowire
description: Single-plugin marketplace for cowire — install via /plugin marketplace add ggrigo/cowire then /plugin install cowire@cowire.

plugins.name: cowire
plugins.description: Hand work between Claude Code and Claude Cowork by capability. /cowire sets up two inbox folders (code/, cowork/) and a routing ledger so the two Claude surfaces pass errands to each other — Code does files/git/shell, Cowork does browser/email/desktop apps. Duct tape until Anthropic ships native cross-surface coordination.
